pi_items.source: Source code analysis of setup_task.sh where TARGET_GIVEN is hardcoded to Mario.
Source code analysis of setup_task.sh where TARGET_FAMILY is hardcoded to Vega.
Source code analysis of setup_task.sh and verifier.py where TARGET_DOB is hardcoded to 1980-03-15.
Verified against the target_dob (1980-03-15) as the standard OpenMRS UI short date format and the task description '15 March 1980'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically seeded patient data derived from Synthea. The target patient 'Mario Vega' is dynamically renamed from an existing synthetic patient by setup_task.sh. The goal is to change their date of birth to the target value '1980-03-15' (displayed as '15 Mar 1980'). These target values are confirmed by checking the hardcoded setup variables in setup_task.sh and verifier logic.
